target: Hah!? It's super sunny today!! Why an umbrella on a hot day like this... It's 35 degrees today!
(True, even if I told him "there's going to be a sudden shower," the weather makes it hard to believe.)
I'll get straight to the point. Shinpei.
About what happened here that day... There's something I have to tell you regarding the cause of Ushio's death.
Yoshikawa lines, right? Meaning I might have been murdered.
Whoa!! Wh... Who's there!? What the hell are you!!!
...Sou. I also have something to tell you about Ushio.
Ushio, ya don't need the disguise anymore.
Hey, Shinpei...!! Maybe it would have been better if I didn't come out...
You don't need to worry about that anymore!! I'll explain everything properly.
I won't let anyone call you a monster.
(About the Shadows, Nagumo-sensei and the others... and about the looping.)
("This time" too, Sou listened quietly until the very end...)
He doesn't screw around or tell jokes... He's a buzzkill who looks at everything objectively, but he's not a liar...!!
Oh you, you're totally trusted aren't ya~~~~!!
I'm sorry... If only I had... performed CPR better back then...
If only I had... more... more...
I... I know apologizing won't change anything! But at least!!
At least... punch me... If you don't, I... I don't have the right to be your ally...
(That scene I saw during my first loop was a real event after all...!!)
You tried so hard to save me, didn't you!! No one is blaming you, and there's no reason for you to get punched—
(She kicked him...!! She kicked him right under the chin!!)
Stand up!! Sou! Are you satisfied now!!!
We're relying on you!! Don't be moping around forever!!!!
It's Ushio, Shinpei... She really is... Ugh... Ushio...!!
Ushio, do you... remember this place? This place... in this sea, you...
The private beach behind the elementary school. So this is where I died...
Totsumura-san gave it to me. He said you entrusted it to him the day before the accident.
I wanted to check the contents, but it's locked.
The password, huh. Hold on... I think it was...
Is she really... connected... to the Shadows...!?
It's just a guess at this point... But...
The Hishigata family... I'm certain that your family is connected to the Shadows...
I had some things I wanted to look into, too... I was just thinking about sneaking into the <color=#GF_TIPS_049>old clinic</color> around today!!
It's an old building from when the Japanese military used this island as a fortress... It's not in use anymore...
(If it's from that long ago, there might still be records of the "mental illness" Hishigata-sensei mentioned!)
Take us... with you to that place!!
The phone unlocked... with fingerprint recognition!
Oh, right! There was that way to unlock it too!
So, how is it? Did you find anything unusual?
Hmmmmmm? Don't rely on my memory~~.
Emails, notes... photos... Look at whatever you can!
The 20th at 5:17... the morning of the day before I died... There's a single video file...!!
What is it, what is it?
